regime_hint.notes: NIFTY closed 23,379.55 (-1.83% Tue) — 2-session cumulative -3.3% from Mon-Tue. SGX Nifty -0.23% (~23,369) implies mild gap-down. US overnight: SPX -0.16%, NDQ -0.71% (tech sell-off, AI/semis weak). USD/INR 95.81 (+1.28%, rupee weak — IT exporter tailwind partially offset by US tech weakness). Crude Brent $107.10 (elevated, bearish India macro). VIX API unavailable; treat as NORMAL given orderly tape. US April CPI 3.8% hot — Fed hawkish overhang. No major India earnings today; SBIN Q4 missed Mon (-11% 2-day), TATAPOWER Q4 beat Mon (+8.3% PAT). Daily regime RANGING but tape carries downward drift — avoid directional bias, treat 09:45 VWAP as bias-flip trigger.

watchlist.notes: Q4 beat May 12 (PAT +8.3% YoY, dividend Rs2.5). Post-results gap risk both ways; require 2+ confirmation. Wide ORB likely — avoid if >2%.
No news, neutral. Sole bank in plan (SBIN out post-Q4 miss). Watch VWAP — banking-cluster volatility leaks from SBIN tape.
5th consecutive down day, Mojo Times Sell rating, but no event today. Jio IPO draft news is forward — not a today catalyst. Take both sides on 2+ confirmation only.
No material news. Top-3 scanner score (2.45). Metals proxy — directional with broader market.
Defensive FMCG, no events. Reasonable hedge against directional uncertainty.
Defensive FMCG, no confirmed Q4 date — treat as no event today. Holds 5/20/50-day MAs per recent research.
IT, USD/INR weakness (95.81) is a tailwind. But US tech sell-off + INFY/TCS sector weakness caps upside. 2+ confirmation only.

Hit 52-week low yesterday (Rs 1,137.05), trading below all key MAs. Both-bias tradeable; bias to short if VWAP rejects, long only on clear reclaim. No event today — investor roadshow ongoing (non-binary).

rationale: RANGING/NORMAL regime with persistent downward drift (NIFTY -3.3% in 2 sessions). Watchlist deliberately defensive: 1 bank (HDFCBANK), 2 FMCG (HINDUNILVR, ITC), 1 power (TATAPOWER, post-Q4), 2 IT (HCLTECH, INFY), 1 metals (SAIL), 1 energy (RELIANCE). All 'both' bias per W19 lesson — directional bias has misfired 3/4 weeks. Hard avoids: SBIN (Q4 miss + General Meeting May 15), BPCL (trading window closed till May 21, Q4 rescheduled), TCS (NCW harassment + 52-wk low), PNB/ETERNAL (outside NIFTY 50 per #lesson 2026-05-05), ADANIENT/INDUSINDBK (volatile history). Risk overrides tightened to max_trades=3, risk=1.0%, max_open=2 — 2-day drawdown + Fed hawkish overhang warrant defensive sizing. 2+ confirmation rule is the load-bearing filter today.
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): Default to bias: both unless catalyst is robust to intraday price action
#lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): On big-bank-print days keep at most one bank in watchlist with both bias (SBIN Q4 — only HDFCBANK kept)
#lesson 2026-05-08: Daily plan bias invalidation not auto-applied in code — prefer both bias
#lesson 2026-05-05: PNB/ETERNAL outside NIFTY 50 — excluded from watchlist
#lesson 2026-04-30: ADANIENT binary event block — extended to all stocks with Q4 today or active trading window restrictions
#lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): 2+ confirmation rule applies unconditionally — risk_overrides + bias=both is the gate
